title: Dirty Plugin With Local Edits
objective: A disposable user state with an installed external plugin that has local user edits OpenClaw must not silently overwrite during plugin inspection, doctor repair, restart, update, or rollback.

setup.title: Write Dirty Plugin Local Edits
setup.intent: Install a local dirty plugin fixture and record a checksum marker inside the disposable env.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs prepare dirty-plugin-local-edits
evidence: dirty local edit plugin fixture exists

setup.title: Verify Dirty Plugin Local Edits
setup.intent: Verify OpenClaw plugin inspection, doctor repair, and restart did not overwrite local plugin edits.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs verify dirty-plugin-local-edits
evidence: dirty local edit checksum still matches

setupEvidence: dirty local edit plugin fixture exists
cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes dirty plugin fixture files

source.note: installed plugin with local user edits and checksum marker
